headline: Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Quietly Repositioning Its Moat Around Complex Risk Specialization?
summary: Brown & Brown recently appointed Neil Krauter Sr. as executive managing director for growth and specialization in its Retail segment, while partners WireX Systems and Marcus & Millichap announced new collaborations that extend the broker’s cyber risk and real estate insurance capabilities. Together, these moves highlight Brown & Brown’s effort to deepen its specialization in private equity, cybersecurity, and commercial real estate, broadening its reach across complex risk markets. We’ll now...
